name: Weather
description: Weather forecasts, saved locations, and current-location tracking — fully self-contained.

requiredApiKeys.name: OpenWeather API Key
requiredApiKeys.description: Used to fetch current weather, forecasts, and location search (Geocoding API).

requiredApiKeys.name: Google Maps API Key
requiredApiKeys.description: Optional — improves reverse-geocoding accuracy when resolving coordinates to a place name.
